pageContext.name: RoboCop
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Hiya Toys present the RoboCop Action Figure!  A PREVIEWS Exclusive! Celebrating the 35th anniversary of the 1987 film RoboCop, Hiya Toys premieres the first item in the new Exquisite Super line: Robocop as a 1:12 scale die-cast action figure!  Compared to the Exquisite Mini series, Exquisite Super figures feature fine detailing and more accessory options. Standing 6.5' tall, this Robocop figure features a die-cast armor suit and 23 points of articulation to re-create your favorite film scenes.
